title: 💡 Hiring Opportunity Alert: Engineering Programs at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE)

description_full:
📍 On-site - Bangalore, India | 🕐 Posted 1 day ago - April 26, 2026 | 💰 Highest Package: ₹56 LPA

Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE), established in 1979 in Bangalore, is highlighting strong placement records and academic programs. The college is recognized for NAAC A Grade, Autonomous status under VTU, and consistent recruitment by top tech firms.

📊 Placement Highlights:
- Highest Package: ₹56 LPA (2025 batch)
- 1,181+ students placed in a single year
- 350+ companies recruiting on campus
- 1,500+ placement offers annually
- Average Package: ₹5 - ₹6.5 LPA (branch dependent)

🏢 Top Recruiters: Microsoft, Amazon, PhonePe, Bosch, Accenture, Infosys, Cognizant, Oracle, Sony, HCL, TCS, SAP, Deloitte, Mercedes-Benz, L&T.

🤝 Internships & Collaborations:
- Paid internships with Fortune 500 firms
- Industry projects with Bosch, ISRO, DRDO, IBM
- Research funded by DST, AICTE & VGST
- 20 dedicated research centres
- MoUs with global universities & tech giants

🎓 Key B.E. Programs:
- Computer Science & Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
- Data Science
- Cyber Security & Blockchain Technology
- Electronics & Communication Engineering
(+13 more UG branches)

🏆 Why DSCE:
- NAAC A Grade | NBA Accredited
- Autonomous | AICTE & UGC Approved
- 23-acre campus in Bangalore
- Ranked Top 100 Engineering — India Today 2025

📩 To apply: Management Quota & Direct Admission OPEN for 2026-27. Call 8123417735 or DM on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bengaluru-admission/ for guidance and fee structure. Limited seats.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/dsce-dayanandasagarcollege-dayanandasagarcollegeofengineering-ugcPost-7453740692515987456-wc_t
